html:
2026-0608
2026-06-12PS, CBSAImmigration and Refugee Protection ActRegulations Amending the Immigration and Refugee Protection Regulations (Seizure and Facilities for Holding and Examination —Miscellaneous Program) Regulations Amending the Immigration and Refugee Protection Regulations (Seizure and Facilities for Holding and Examination —Miscellaneous Program) in order to (1) specify that an applicant seeking to have a seized thing returned must “make written submissions” rather than “demonstrate” that the seizure of the thing is no longer needed for the prevention of improper or fraudulent use; (2) specify that once a decision has been made to return the thing that it “must” rather than “shall” be returned without delay; and (3) clarify provisions regarding the provision of facilities for holding and examination by replacing the term” without cost to Her Majesty” with the term “free of charge” and better aligning the French version with the English version.Registration: SOR/2026-0128 Publication Date: 2026-07-01
subject: Regulations Amending the Immigration and Refugee Protection Regulations (Seizure and Facilities for Holding and Examination —Miscellaneous Program)
precis: Regulations Amending the Immigration and Refugee Protection Regulations (Seizure and Facilities for Holding and Examination —Miscellaneous Program) in order to (1) specify that an applicant seeking to have a seized thing returned must “make written submissions” rather than “demonstrate” that the seizure of the thing is no longer needed for the prevention of improper or fraudulent use; (2) specify that once a decision has been made to return the thing that it “must” rather than “shall” be returned without delay; and (3) clarify provisions regarding the provision of facilities for holding and examination by replacing the term” without cost to Her Majesty” with the term “free of charge” and better aligning the French version with the English version.
